description: Test cases for decision fallback behavior - verifies routing to correct decisions

test_cases.query: What is the weather like today?
test_cases.description: Weather query should fall back to general/other decision
Entertainment query should fall back to general decision

test_cases.description: Unclassified query should fall back to general decision
